calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Prohibiting Foreclosure Sale
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ann McFarland Draper (415-391-4200) of Draper Law Offices for Anthony C. Kelley, plaintiff and moving party / Andrew Sabey (415-392-4200) of Cox Castle Nicholson LLP for Western States Ventures, LLC, defendant and opposing party;

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts its tentative ruling as modified: Plaintiffs' Motion for Preliminary Injunction is DENIED. TRO is dissolved per its own terms as of October 30, 2012. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: M. Smith, Not Reported (501)

Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Prohibiting Foreclosure Sale
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ann McFarland Draper (415-391-4200) of Draper Law Offices for Anthony C. Kelley, plaintiff and moving party; No other party

The tentative ruling is adopted as modified: Plaintiffs' Order To Show Cause To Prohibiting Foreclosure Sale is continued to NOV-14-2012 on court's own motion. Temporary Restrainig Order is extended to NOV-14-2012. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
